f) Class sizes shrink

...and we're still supposed to believe there are only 11 million illegal aliens in the country?!

posts.author: kek_saved_the_world
posts.title: “We aren’t here to co-exist. We’ve been sent here to dominate and wipe you out.”

twitter.content:
A Muslim man in the U.K. makes a disturbing claim rejecting coexistence.

“We aren’t here to co-exist. We’ve been sent here to dominate and wipe you out.”
